title_en: ChatGPT Pro $100 Plan With 5X Codex Limits Launches
summary_en: OpenAI introduces new $100/month ChatGPT Pro tier offering 5X coding capabilities compared to Plus plan. Perfect mid-tier option for developers and AI coders looking to monetize their skills.

title_en: Meta AI App Hits #5 After Muse Spark Launch
summary_en: Meta's new proprietary AI model Muse Spark drives app rankings from #57 to #5 on App Store. First major release since abandoning open-source approach presents new monetization opportunities.

title_en: Sierra Ghostwriter Builds AI Agents With Natural Language
summary_en: Revolutionary agent-as-a-service tool lets users describe needs in plain English to create specialized AI agents. Eliminates traditional app interfaces for streamlined business automation.

title_en: LLM Traffic Converts 30-40% Higher Than Traditional Sources
summary_en: AI-referred website traffic shows dramatically higher conversion rates, yet most businesses aren't optimizing for it. Answer Engine Optimization becomes crucial for revenue growth.

title_en: Block Launches Managerbot Proactive AI Agent for Square
summary_en: Jack Dorsey's Block unveils AI agent that monitors businesses and proposes solutions automatically. Represents major shift toward proactive AI business management tools.

title_en: Memento-Skills Framework Lets AI Agents Self-Improve
summary_en: New framework enables AI agents to develop skills autonomously without retraining underlying models. Adds continual learning to existing platforms like OpenClaw and Claude.

title_en: Codex Gets Flexible Pay-As-You-Go Pricing for Teams
summary_en: OpenAI introduces more affordable pricing options for Codex, making enterprise AI adoption easier. Teams can now scale coding assistance based on actual usage.

title_en: Anthropic's Mythos Finds 27-Year-Old Bug Autonomously
summary_en: Claude Mythos discovered critical vulnerability that survived decades of human review for under $50. Demonstrates AI's superior capability in security testing and code auditing.

title_en: Billboard Business Generates $30K Monthly Part-Time Income
summary_en: Chris Brown built profitable billboard side hustle earning $30,000 monthly with 30 billboards. Retired early at 42 through strategic outdoor advertising investments.

title_en: AI Overviews Stealing Clicks From Paid Search Campaigns
summary_en: Google's AI Overviews answer questions before users click ads, changing paid search dynamics. Teams must adapt strategies as impressions stay steady but clicks decline.

title_en: GEO Strategy: Don't Let Prompt Volume Drive Decisions
summary_en: Generative Engine Optimization success requires moving beyond estimated prompt data to focus on actual results. Most GEO advice relies on unreliable volume metrics.

title_en: 19 Fitness Side Hustles Earning Up to $20K Monthly
summary_en: Multiple fitness-related income streams allow you to stay active while earning substantial money. Opportunities range from training to wellness consulting and equipment sales.

title_en: Get Paid $500 Yearly for Your Personal Data
summary_en: Turn your daily data creation into income through legitimate platforms that pay for information sharing. Big data industry worth $270 billion offers individual earning opportunities.

title_en: 28 Odd Job Apps Pay Up to $100 Per Hour
summary_en: Flexible odd job applications offer high hourly rates for various tasks and services. Perfect for earning extra income on your own schedule.

title_en: Service Business Step-by-Step Income Replacement Guide
summary_en: Starting a service business offers fastest path to extra income with minimal startup costs. No barriers to entry make it ideal for quick revenue generation.

title_en: Anthropic Revenue Surpasses OpenAI at $30 Billion
summary_en: Enterprise demand drives Anthropic's revenue run rate past OpenAI's $24 billion, doubling million-dollar customers. Significant shift in AI market leadership dynamics.

title_en: Enterprise AI Moves Beyond Advisory to Production Phase
summary_en: OutSystems survey reveals AI adoption accelerating in IT functions but needs centralized management. Enterprise AI transitions from experimental to operational deployment.

title_en: Microsoft Open-Source Toolkit Secures AI Agents Runtime
summary_en: New security toolkit forces strict governance on autonomous AI agents executing code in corporate networks. Addresses growing anxiety over AI integration speed.

title_en: Side Hustle Stacking: One Stream Leads to Multiple Incomes
summary_en: Bjork Ostrom demonstrates how single food blog evolved into multiple profitable online businesses. Strategic diversification creates sustainable income portfolio over time.

title_en: 10 Proven Rules to Build Generational Wealth
summary_en: No shortcuts exist for lasting wealth creation, but following fundamental principles works. Time, discipline and sustained effort can transform any financial starting point.
